title: Landmark Books Advisory Limited is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Landmark Books Advisory Limited is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Landmark Books Advisory Limited in Delhi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Landmark Books Advisory Limited:
Landmark Books Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Books Advisory Limited!
